effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名区域里有牌的其他角色使用。弃置该角色区域内的一张牌。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character who has at least one card in any zone. Discard one card from that character's zone.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名有手牌的其他角色使用。该角色展示一张手牌，然后你可以弃置一张与展示牌颜色相同的手牌，令该角色受到1点火焰伤害。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character who has hand cards. That character reveals one hand card. You may discard a hand card of the same color to deal 1 fire damage to them.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名装备区里有武器牌的其他角色使用，并指定另一名在其攻击范围内的角色。除非该角色对另一名角色使用一张【杀】，否则将该角色的武器牌交给你。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character with a weapon in their Equipment Zone, and designate a second character within their Attack Range. Unless the first character uses a [Kill] on the second, their weapon is given to you.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名其他角色使用。由该角色先出，然后你们依次轮流打出一张【杀】，直到其中一名角色无法打出【杀】时，该角色受到1点伤害（来源为另一名角色）。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character. That character plays a [Kill] first, then you alternate. The first player unable to play a [Kill] takes 1 damage from the other.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对所有其他角色使用。这些角色须依次各打出一张【杀】，否则受到1点伤害。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on all other characters. Each character must in sequence play out a [Kill] or take 1 damage.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对距离为1的一名区域里有牌的其他角色使用。你获得该角色区域内的一张牌。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character at distance 1 who has at least one card in any zone. You gain one card from that character's zone.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对所有角色使用。所有角色依次各回复1点体力。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on all characters. Each character recovers 1 HP in sequence.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一至两名角色使用。目标角色横置或重置。(被横置的角色处于〖连环状态〗）
重铸：出牌阶段，你可以将此牌置入弃牌堆，然后摸一张牌。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on one or two characters. Each target is placed in horizontal position or Reset.
Reforge: During your Action Phase, you may place this card into the Discard Pile to draw 1 card. Reforging is not considered using this Tool card.

faq.q_cn: 连环状态是按配对记录的吗？
faq.a_cn: 不是。连环状态是全局的，所有连环角色视为同一组。任意连环角色受到属性伤害时，所有其他连环角色都受到等量伤害。
faq.q_en: Is chain status tracked in specific pairs?
faq.a_en: No. Chain status is global — all chained characters form one group. Elemental damage to any one of them transmits to all others regardless of how they were linked.

faq.q_cn: 可以只选择1名角色使用此牌吗？
可以同时横置一名角色并重置另一名角色吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。此牌切换每名目标各自的当前状态，两名目标独立结算。
faq.q_en: Can I chain one character and unchain another with the same card?
faq.a_en: Yes. The card toggles each target's state independently — an unchained target becomes chained and vice versa.

faq.q_cn: 【无懈可击】可以抵消【铁索连环】吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以，但只能针对一名目标——它令该目标不成为此次【铁索连环】的目标，从而阻止其状态被改变。另一名目标的状态仍会改变。重铸时不能使用【无懈可击】。
faq.a_en: Yes, but only for one target at a time — it removes that target from the card's effect, preventing their state from changing. The other target's state still changes. [Nullification] cannot be used against a Reforge.

faq.q_cn: 连环角色的攻击被【闪】躲避后，其他连环角色需要响应吗？
faq.a_cn: 不需要。连环只传递伤害，未造成伤害则不触发。
faq.q_en: If an attack on a chained character is dodged, do other chained characters need to respond?
faq.a_en: No. Chains only transmit damage — if no damage is dealt, the chain does not trigger.

faq.q_cn: 藤甲与连环伤害如何互动？
faq.a_cn: 传递的伤害等于原始受击者实际受到的伤害。若藤甲使其受到2点伤害，其他连环角色也受到2点伤害。
faq.q_en: How does [Rattan Armour] interact with chain damage?
faq.a_en: Transmitted damage matches what the original target actually receives. If [Rattan Armour] raises their damage to 2, all other chained characters also receive 2.

faq.q_cn: 【过河拆桥】或【顺手牵羊】能解除连环状态吗？
faq.a_cn: 不能。连环状态是武将牌的横置状态，不是一张牌，无法被弃置或获取。唯一能切换连环状态的方式是再次对该角色使用【铁索连环】（令其重置）。
faq.a_en: No. Chain status is a positional state of the general card (horizontally placed), not a card that can be discarded or taken. The only way to toggle chain status is to use [Iron Shackles] on that character again (which Resets them).

faq.q_cn: 重铸时，黄月英能额外摸一张牌吗？
faq.a_cn: 不能。重铸不被视为使用锦囊牌，黄月英的技能不会触发。
faq.q_en: Can Huang Yue Ying draw an extra card when [Iron Shackles] is Reforged?
faq.a_en: No. Reforging is not considered using a tool card, so Huang Yue Ying's skill does not trigger.

faq.q_cn: 使用【铁索连环】有距离限制吗？
faq.a_cn: 没有，可以对任意角色使用。
faq.q_en: Is there a range restriction when using [Iron Shackles]?
faq.a_en: No. [Iron Shackles] can target any character regardless of distance.

faq.q_cn: 若多名连环角色同时死亡，结算顺序是什么？
faq.a_cn: 按从使用者开始逆时针方向的顺序依次结算。
faq.q_en: If multiple chained characters die simultaneously, what is the elimination order?

faq.q_cn: 主公通过连环伤害间接杀死忠臣，需要弃置所有手牌和装备牌吗？
faq.a_cn: 需要。主公仍是伤害来源，无论是否通过连环传导。
faq.q_en: If the Ruler kills a Loyalist through chain damage, do they still discard all cards?
faq.a_en: Yes. The Ruler is still the damage source regardless of whether it was direct or transmitted.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对所有其他角色使用。这些角色须依次各打出一张【闪】，否则受到1点伤害。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on all other characters. Each character must play a [Dodge] in turn or take 1 damage.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对所有角色使用。从牌堆顶亮出等同于现存角色数量的牌，所有角色依次各选择并获得其中一张牌，多余的牌置入弃牌堆。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on all characters. Flip cards from the top of the Draw Pile equal to the number of surviving characters. Each character in sequence selects and gains one of those cards; remaining cards are placed into the Discard Pile.

effect_cn: 当一张锦囊牌生效前，抵消该锦囊牌的效果；或抵消一张【无懈可击】的效果。
effect_en: When a tool card is about to take effect, negate its effect; or negate another [Nullification].

faq.q_cn: 一张【无懈可击】可以抵消群体锦囊对所有人的效果吗？
faq.a_cn: 不可以。针对群体锦囊，一张【无懈可击】只能保护一名目标，保护多人需对每人分别使用。
faq.q_en: Does one [Nullification] negate an AOE card for everyone?
faq.a_en: No. One [Nullification] only protects one target. A separate [Nullification] is needed for each person you want to protect.

faq.q_cn: 我可以在同一次群体锦囊中使用多张【无懈可击】吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。每名目标的结算是独立时机，手牌充足时可分别打出多张保护不同角色。
faq.q_en: Can I use multiple [Nullification] cards during one AOE resolution?
faq.a_en: Yes. Each target resolves independently — you can play separate [Nullification] cards for different people as long as you have them.

faq.q_cn: 对【五谷丰登】使用【无懈可击】会发生什么？
faq.a_cn: 被抵消的目标跳过摸牌，其原本可拿的牌留在牌堆供后续角色选取。
faq.q_en: What happens if [Nullification] is used during [Harvest]?
faq.a_en: The target is skipped and cannot choose a card. The card they would have taken remains in the pool for later players.

faq.q_cn: 【桃园结义】被【无懈可击】抵消后，其他角色还能回血吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。【无懈可击】只影响被指定的那一名目标，其他角色仍正常回血。
faq.q_en: If [Peach Garden] is nullified for one person, do the others still recover health?
faq.a_en: Yes. [Nullification] only affects the one target it is played against — all other players still recover health normally.

faq.q_cn: 对方用【无懈可击】抵消我的【无懈可击】，会影响其他人的结算吗？
faq.a_cn: 不会。反制只决定当前目标是否受影响，不影响群体锦囊对其他角色的后续结算。
faq.q_en: If my [Nullification] is countered, does it affect other players in the AOE?
faq.a_en: No. The counter only resolves the interaction for the current target — it does not affect the AOE card's resolution for anyone else.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对自己使用。你摸两张牌。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on yourself. Draw 2 cards.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名已受伤的角色使用。你观看目标角色的手牌，若你与其手牌中均有【毒】，则你弃置其中一张【毒】并与其各摸两张牌，否则你与其各受到1点无来源伤害。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on a Wounded character. Look at that character's hand cards. If both you and they have [Poison] in hand, discard one [Poison] from among those cards and you each draw 2 cards. Otherwise, you each receive 1 damage with no source.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名已受伤的角色使用。该角色回复1点体力，然后可以弃置一张【毒】（防止【毒】的效果）。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on a Wounded character. That character recovers 1 HP, then may discard a [Poison] from their hand to prevent that [Poison]'s effect.

faq.q_cn: 【刮骨疗毒】可以替代【桃】使用吗？
faq.a_cn: 在一定程度上可以。【刮骨疗毒】与【桃】相同，可以回复1点体力，但还可以额外弃置一张【毒】消除其效果，而【桃】无法做到这点。
faq.a_en: Partly. Like [Peach], it recovers 1 HP. However, it also allows the target to discard a [Poison] to remove its effect — something [Peach] cannot do.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名其他角色使用。该角色必须对你打出一张【杀】，否则，你可获得他区域内的两张牌。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character. That character must play a [Kill] targeting you. If they do not, you gain 2 cards from their zone.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名体力为1点的角色使用。将进行一次判定，若不为黑桃牌，你当前体力回复到上限值。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on a character whose HP Value is 1. Perform a Judgment. If the result is not Spades, you recover HP up to your Max HP.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，除你以外的角色，依次两项选其一：1.弃置四张牌；2.本回合不能打出任何牌。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on all characters other than yourself. Each character in sequence chooses one: 1. Discard 4 cards; 2. Cannot play out any cards this turn.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段,选择一名角色下之拼点。胜方获得败方的所有手牌。
effect_en: Action Phase: Choose one character and conduct a Point Duel with them. The winner gains all of the loser's hand cards.

effect_cn: 1.出牌阶段对一名装备区内有武器牌的角色使用，将此牌放置其武器牌旁边，其武器牌获得如下效果 〖攻击范围+1，使用【杀】造成的伤害+1。〗
2.出牌阶段对你使用，连续牌堆顶一张牌，直到出现一张装备牌为止，你获得之。
effect_en: 1. Action Phase: Use on a character who has a weapon in their Equipment Zone — place this card beside their weapon. That weapon gains: Attack Range +1 and damage dealt by [Kill] +1.
2. Action Phase: Use on yourself — flip cards from the top of the Draw Pile one at a time until an Equipment card is revealed. You gain that Equipment card.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名距离大于等于3的角色使用，该角色必须连续打出2张【闪】，否则减少1点体力。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on a character at distance 3 or greater. That character must play out 2 [Dodge] cards in sequence. If they cannot, they lose 1 HP.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对所有其他角色使用，由你弃掉每名目标角色区域里的一张牌。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on all other characters. You discard one card from each target character's zone.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段对自己使用后，直到回合结束前，可以打出任意数量的【杀】。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on yourself. Until the end of your turn, you may use any number of [Kill] cards.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段,对一名其他角色使用, 该角色必须连续打出两张【杀】, 否则会受到1点伤害。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character. That character must play out 2 [Kill] cards in sequence. If they cannot, they take 1 damage.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名本轮未对你造成过伤害的其他角色使用。你弃置其一张牌，然后其须打出一张点数为偶数的手牌，否则你对其造成1点雷电伤害。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character who has not dealt damage to you this round. You discard one of their cards, then they must play out a hand card with an even rank. If they cannot, you deal 1 lightning damage to them.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对其他所有角色使用。其须打出一张【杀】，否则摸一张牌。若因此摸牌的角色数大于未摸牌角色，摸牌的角色弃两张牌并受到1点火焰伤害。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on all other characters. Each must play out a [Kill]; if they do not, they draw 1 card instead. If more characters drew cards than did not, all characters who drew discard 2 cards and take 1 fire damage.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对所有其他角色使用。其资弃置两张牌，否则你对其造成2点火焰伤害。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on all other characters. Each must discard 2 cards. If they do not, you deal 2 fire damage to them.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名其他角色使用。若如此做，你亮出牌堆顶四张牌并依次对目标角色使用其中的【杀】，结算结束后，将其余的牌置入弃牌堆。
effect_en: During your Action Phase, use this on one other character. Flip the top 4 cards of the Draw Pile face-up, then use each [Kill] among them on the target one at a time. After all resolutions are complete, place the remaining cards into the Discard Pile.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，选择两名手牌数不同的角色并记录其各自手牌数，令手牌数多的角色弃置一张牌，手牌数少的角色摸一张牌。此牌结算结束时，若此两名角色手牌数相同，且执行此锦囊所弃的牌仍在弃牌堆中，你可以将此牌交给任一角色。
重铸：出牌阶段，你可以将此牌置入弃牌堆，然后摸一张牌。
effect_en: During your Action Phase, choose two characters with different hand card counts and note each count. The character with more hand cards discards 1 card; the character with fewer hand cards draws 1 card. When this card's resolution ends, if both chosen characters now have the same hand card count and the card discarded by executing this Tool is still in the Discard Pile, you may give that discarded card to any character.
Reforge: During your Action Phase, you may place this card into the Discard Pile, then draw 1 card.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对距离为1的一名其他角色使用。将【兵粮寸断】置入该角色的判定区。该角色判定阶段，若判定结果不为梅花，其跳过本回合的摸牌阶段。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character at distance 1. Place [Starvation] into that character's Judgment Zone. During their Judgment Phase, if the result is not a Clubs, that character skips their Draw Phase this turn.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对一名其他角色使用。将【乐不思蜀】置入该角色的判定区。该角色判定阶段，若判定结果不为红桃，其跳过本回合的出牌阶段。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on another character. Place [Acedia] into that character's Judgment Zone. During their Judgment Phase, if the result is not a Hearts, that character skips their Action Phase this turn.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对自己使用。将【闪电】置入你的判定区。你的判定阶段，若判定结果为黑桃2至9，你受到3点雷电伤害；否则将【闪电】移至下家的判定区。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on yourself. Place [Lightning] into your Judgment Zone. During your Judgment Phase, if the result is a Spades between 2 and 9, you take 3 lightning damage; otherwise, move [Lightning] to the next player's Judgment Zone.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对自己使用，放置在自己的判定区，待下个回合开始阶段进行判定，若判定结果不为方块，则自己摸取8张手牌，并跳过本回合的出牌阶段和弃牌阶段。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on yourself. Place [Summon God] into your Judgment Zone. At the start of your next turn's Starting Phase, perform a Judgment. If the result is not Diamonds, draw 8 cards and skip that turn's Action Phase and Discard Phase.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，对任意一名角色使用，将【美人计】置入其判定区。该角色判定阶段，若判定结果为红桃，其须将全部手牌交给场上任意一名异性角色；若判定结果不为红桃，将【美人计】移至其下家的判定区。若场上全部为同性角色，则此牌无效。
effect_en: Action Phase: Use on any character — place [Beauty Stratagem] into their Judgment Zone. During their Judgment Phase, perform a Judgment. If the result is Hearts, that character must give all their hand cards to any one character of the opposite gender on the field. If the result is not Hearts, move [Beauty Stratagem] to their Right Neighbor's Judgment Zone. If all characters on the field are the same gender, this card is Nullified.
